prompt: A high-rise apartment balcony at sunset overlooking a sprawling modern city skyline with glass skyscrapers reflecting golden light, a river winding through the urban landscape, an orange and purple sunset sky, and a potted plant on the balcony floor beside the sleek metal railing. Beyond the current view to the right, neighboring high-rise towers with lit windows stand close by, and a rooftop swimming pool on a lower building is visible below. Behind the viewer through the sliding glass door, a modern living room with a grey sectional sofa, a floor lamp, and a wall-mounted television is dimly lit by warm interior light. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level from the balcony, looking out over the city skyline with the metal railing in the foreground.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A high-rise apartment balcony at sunset overlooks a sprawling modern city skyline with glass skyscrapers reflecting golden light, a river winding through the urban landscape, an orange and purple sunset sky, and a potted plant on the balcony floor beside the sleek metal railing.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Beyond the current view to the right, neighboring high-rise towers with lit windows stand close by, and a rooftop swimming pool on a lower building is visible below. Behind the viewer through the sliding glass door, a modern living room with a grey sectional sofa, a floor lamp, and a wall-mounted television is dimly lit by warm interior light.
